content.body:
Extends TreeSitterASTExtractor with systems-language grammar support. Rust
extracts struct/enum/trait/impl/fn. C and C++ extract struct specifiers,
typedefs, and function definitions — including pointer-return functions via
pointer_declarator unwrapping in the Scheme query.

Fixtures: sample.rs, sample.c, sample.cpp.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
content.subject: feat(cartographer): add Rust, C, and C++ AST extraction
